basics.name: Vivek Keshava
basics.label: Student
basics.summary: I'm a graduate student in computer science at Arizona State University. I will be graduating in May 2023. I am actively looking for full time opportunities

work.summary: Instructor for CSE485 Capstone Project class
highlights: Working as Instructor for CSE 485 under Dr. Helen Chavez.
Handling a class of 110 students with their Capstone projects.
Guiding the students on AGILE and SCRUM methodologies for software development on real life projects.
Spearheaded multiple features for the team on microservices and cloud-based deployments and delivered it on time with high quality.
Conducted technical customer support sessions on the new features to multiple customer-facing teams across the globe.

Solved time critical issues for the global customers with high turnaround time. Scrum/AGILE methodology was used during the development process. Followed the Test-driven development model to ensure good code quality.
Architected and migrated the on-premises NOM product to the AWS cloud platform to facilitate support for a SaaS based model.
Developed scalable micro-service architecture system to fetch and process data from multiple data streams and databases.

Developed REST APIs (Xml/Json) for backend framework of NNMi product to render analytics on network data fetched from multiple networking devices. Apache Pulsar was used for data streaming. Worked with Zookeeper services for password and key management

volunteer.summary: Chairman of the IEEE-SJCE student chapter
highlights: Played a pivotal role in ensuring the highest ever membership in the student club of 250+ members, since its inception in 1992
Increased the emphasis on industry-academia interaction by starting the initiative of Industrial visits to manufacturing plants for the students.
